keyEvents.text: Goal! Columbus Crew 1, One Knoxville 0. Hugo Picard (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Yevhen Cheberko.
Goal! Columbus Crew 1, One Knoxville 1. Braudílio Rodrigues (One Knoxville) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Columbus Crew 2, One Knoxville 1. Hugo Picard (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner.
Substitution, One Knoxville. Stávros Zarokóstas replaces Eli Conway because of an injury.
Mikkel Gøling (One Knoxville) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, One Knoxville. Teddy Baker replaces John Murphy.
Substitution, One Knoxville. Donovan Williams replaces Will Perkins.
Second Half begins Columbus Crew 2, One Knoxville 1.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Taha Habroune replaces Jamal Thiaré.
Substitution, One Knoxville. Denis Krioutchenkov replaces Babacar Diene.
Goal! Columbus Crew 3, One Knoxville 1. Dániel Gazdag (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Owen Presthus.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Kevin Gbamblé replaces Hugo Picard.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Chase Adams replaces Dániel Gazdag.
Goal! Columbus Crew 4, One Knoxville 1. Chase Adams (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Taha Habroune.
Substitution, One Knoxville. Kyle Linhares replaces Braudílio Rodrigues.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Sean Zawadzki replaces Sékou Bangoura.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Tristan Brown replaces Andrés Herrera.
